title: Good News!
description:
As an Bee Mage, deliberate play will be key. Sneaking mid-air will allow you to fly limitlessly, which is not only great for traversal, but also fantastic for avoiding and weaving through combat encounters too.

With your Cupid Bow, try and aim for your foes' heads if they have one for additional damage. Don't worry about ammo or durability - It's not limited by either of these things!

Your Healing Swarm Scroll is what entitles you to the role of Mage. With it, you can spend experience to summon temorary Bee allies. These Bees will only live for 30 seconds, but they can reliably gang-up on threats that might otherwise give you trouble.

Using your Scroll will also heal other nearby players. Make good use of this when things are getting dire!

The greatest threat towards you is your small health pool. Fortunately, this can be countered via Diet Diversity: The more varied your diet, the more maxium health you can accrue! Make good use of your flight and find as many different ingredients as you can to get those hitpoints up!
